zh.lifeSummary: 當William Leavitt於1528年出生在英國越可爾希亞活時，他的父親William Leavitt48歲，母親Ann Levitt45歲。他於從1545年1月到1545年12月與Joan Yuglande在英國越可爾希亞活結婚。他去世於1569年7月6日在他的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國越可爾希亞活。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Leavitt于1528年出生在英国越可爾希亞活时，他的父亲William Leavitt48岁，母亲Ann Levitt45岁。他于从1545年1月到1545年12月与Joan Yuglande在英国越可爾希亞活结婚。他去世于1569年7月6日在他的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在英国越可爾希亞活。

nameMeanings.name: Leavitt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French leuet ‘wolf cub’ (see Low 3).
habitational name from any of various places in Normandy called Livet. All are of obscure, presumably Gaulish, etymology.

variants.name: Low
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tumulus, mound or hill, Middle English lowe, from Old English hlāw (see Law 2).

Scottish and English: nickname for a short man, from Middle English lah, lowe (Old Norse lágr; the word was adopted first into the northern dialects of Middle English, where Scandinavian influence was strong, and then spread south, with regular alteration of the vowel quality).

English and Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname for a violent or dangerous person, from Anglo-Norman French lou, leu ‘wolf’ (from Latin lupus). Wolves were relatively common in Britain at the time when most surnames were formed, as there still existed large tracts of uncleared forest.

variants.name: Levitt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Isador, Isadore, Ari, Batya, Hersh, Mayer, Meyer, Rina.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When William Leavitt was born in 1528, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Leavitt, was 48 and his mother, Ann Levitt, was 45. He married Joan Yuglande from January 1545 to December 1545, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England. He died on 6 July 1569, in his hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Leavitt est né en 1528, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Leavitt, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Ann Levitt, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Joan Yuglande du janvier 1545 au décembre 1545, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 6 juillet 1569, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre.

Er hat von Januar 1545 bis Dezember 1545 in Harewood, Yorkshire, England Joan Yuglande geheiratet. Er starb am 6. Juli 1569 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Harewood, Yorkshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Joan Yuglande da gennaio 1545 a dicembre 1545, nel Harewood, Yorkshire, England. Morì il 6 luglio 1569, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Leavittが1528年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドで生まれた時，父William Leavittは48歳，母Ann Levittは45歳であった。から1545年1月まで1545年12月にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドでJoan Yuglandeと結婚した。彼は1569年7月6日に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Leavitt(이)가 1528년 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Leavitt(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Levitt(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1545년 1월 부터 1545년 12월 까지 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에서 Joan Yuglande(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1569년 7월 6일 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Joan Yuglande de janeiro de 1545 a dezembro de 1545, em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Leavitt родился в 1528 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Leavitt было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Levitt, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Yuglande с январь 1545 по декабрь 1545 в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия. Он умер 6 июля 1569 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия.
